title: Custom Jukebox Songs (Example Pack)
description: a datapack / resource pack that adds all the files you need to create custom jukebox songs in 1.21.4
body:
This datapack / required resource pack is a example pack that adds all the files you need to add custom jukebox songs in minecraft (1.21.4)

How it works:
- Download / unzip the pack
- If you are in a version above 1.21.4 adjust the pack formats as needed
- locate the jukebox_songs folder inside the datapack
- adjust the json files inside that folder and change them to match what you need
- inside the resource pack make sure to add a sound event inside the sounds.json

In game command to get the custom song:
/give @s mace[jukebox_playable={song:'namespace:name of json in jukebox song', show_in_tooltip:true}]

Better Tutorial in video form:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aB44MhGW_e4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
